pubgmobile:
PUBG Mobile is an online Battle Royale game where 100 players land on a map, collect weapons and armor, and try to survive until the end. The game combines shooting mechanics, tactics, fast reflexes, and teamwork.

Main PUBG Mobile Modes

Classic Mode
The most popular mode where 100 players play on one large map.

Maps:

Erangel — classic and balanced

Miramar — long-range combat

Sanhok — fast-paced matches

Livik — small and dynamic

Vikendi — snowy environment

Arena Mode
Fast combat modes:

Team Deathmatch (TDM)

Gun Game

Domination

Arena is great for beginners to practice aim and reflexes.

Most Important Controls

1. HUD (Control Layout)
HUD means the layout of buttons on the screen.

For beginners:

Right side — fire button

Left side — movement

Scope and crouch placed comfortably for thumbs

Best Styles:

3 Finger Claw — good for beginners

4 Finger — professional control

Gyroscope + 4 Fingers — strongest combination

Gyroscope — Very Important
Gyroscope uses phone movement for aiming.

Recommended:

Always On

Low sensitivity at first

Helps with:

recoil control

spraying

fast tracking

Sensitivity
Sensitivity controls camera and scope speed.

Beginner settings:

Camera:

Free Look: 100%

Red Dot: 50–70%

4x: 20–30%

ADS:

Red Dot: 50%

3x: 35%

4x: 25%

Gyroscope:

Red Dot: 250–300

3x: 200

4x: 150

Aim Improvement

Daily practice:

Arena TDM

Training Ground

Headshot practice

Spray transfer

Important:

Keep crosshair at head level

Don’t run while aiming

Crouch spraying is better

Recoil Control
Recoil is weapon kickback.

How to control:

Pull finger slightly downward while spraying

Use gyroscope

Compensator helps a lot

Best Beginner Weapons

Assault Rifles:

M416 — easiest recoil

SCAR-L — stable

AUG — strong late game

SMG:

UMP45 — great for close range

Snipers:

AWM — strongest sniper

Kar98k — popular bolt-action

Attachments:

Compensator — reduces recoil

Suppressor — silences shots

Extended Mag — more bullets

Angled Grip — faster ADS

Vertical Grip — better recoil control

Landing Tips:

Avoid hot drop zones

Choose medium loot areas

Erangel: Farm / Mylta
Livik: near Midstein

Safe Zone Tips:

Always keep a vehicle

Check map often

Rotate early

Sound & Footsteps:

Use headphones

Watch mini-map footsteps

Learn prefire from sound

Peek & Movement:

Enable Peek & Fire

Jiggle movement improves fights

Graphics:

Smooth + Extreme FPS is best

FPS is more important than graphics

Auto Pick-up:

meds
ammo
attachments

Rank System:

Bronze
Silver
Gold
Platinum
Diamond
Crown
Ace
Conqueror

Solo vs Squad:

Solo — survival learning
Squad — teamwork learning (easier)

Survival Tips:

Avoid open fields

Always carry smokes

Don’t fight without cover

Be patient in final zone

Advanced Tips:

Drop shot
Pre-fire
Crosshair placement
Third-person camera abuse

Common Mistakes:

Too much loot
Running in open areas
High sensitivity on scopes
Solo rushing squads
Bad healing timing

Daily Routine:

20 min TDM
10 min training
3 classic matches
Small sensitivity adjustments

Optimization:

Close background apps
Enable gaming mode
Use 60+ FPS
Avoid overheating
Stable internet

Top 5 Tips:

Positioning > aim
Headphones help a lot
Learn gyroscope early
Use smooth + high FPS
Always fight with cover
brawlstars:
Brawl Stars is a multiplayer online action game by Supercell. It features fast matches, different modes, and unique characters called Brawlers, each with their own attacks and abilities.

Main Modes

Gem Grab
3v3 mode where teams collect gems.
Win condition: hold 10 gems until countdown ends.

Showdown
Battle Royale mode.
Solo or Duo.
Last player/team wins.

Brawl Ball
Football-style mode.
Score 2 goals to win.
Teamwork is important.

Heist
One team defends a safe, the other attacks it.

Siege
Collect bolts to build a robot that attacks enemies.

Hot Zone
Control zones longer than the enemy team.

Knockout
Round-based mode, no respawns in a round.

Controls

Movement joystick — move
Attack button — basic attack
Super button — special ability

Aim System

Auto aim — close range
Manual aim — long range (important for skill)

Key Mechanics

Dodging — avoid attacks using movement
Peeking — quick attack from cover
Bush control — hiding in bushes for advantage

Brawler Types

Tank — high HP (El Primo, Bull)
Sharpshooter — long range (Piper, Brock)
Assassin — fast burst damage (Edgar, Leon)
Support — helps team (Poco, Byron)
Thrower — attacks over walls (Dynamike, Barley)

Beginner Brawlers:
Shelly, Nita, Colt, Jessie, Bull

Progression System:
Power Points + Coins upgrade Brawlers
Gadgets — special abilities
Star Powers — passive boosts
Hypercharge — strongest upgrade

Tips:

Don’t rely only on auto aim
Learn movement + shooting together
Use walls for cover
Stay with team

Common Mistakes:
Solo rushing
Wasting super
Standing in open areas
Bad gem carrier play

Advanced Tips:
Ammo management
Super chaining
Prediction aiming
Map awareness

Top Tips:
Movement is as important as aim
Teamwork wins matches
Know your role
Learn maps

How to improve:
Play daily, watch pro players, learn maps and matchups
minecraft:
Minecraft is a sandbox game where players explore, build, survive, and craft in a block-based world.

Main Modes

Survival
Collect resources, craft tools, survive mobs, manage health and hunger.

Creative
Unlimited resources, flying, and building freely.

Adventure
Custom maps mode with restrictions.

Hardcore
One life only, hardest survival mode.

Controls
WASD movement, space jump, shift crouch, mouse for breaking/placing blocks.

First Steps
Cut wood, craft planks, make crafting table, tools, and shelter before night.

Resources
Wood, stone, iron, gold, diamond, netherite

Tools
Pickaxe, axe, shovel, sword, hoe

Armor
Helmet, chestplate, leggings, boots

Food
Cooked meat, bread, carrots

Mining Tips
Use torches, watch lava, mine carefully at low levels

Mobs
Zombie, skeleton, creeper, spider

Combat
Sword, bow, shield, critical hits

Enchanting
Improves tools with upgrades like Sharpness, Protection, Efficiency

Dimensions
Nether — dangerous lava world
End — Ender Dragon boss fight

Villagers
Trading system for items and gear

Redstone
Used for machines, farms, traps, automation

Building Tips
Use mixed materials, lighting, depth, and design roofs

Farming
Wheat, carrots, animals for food supply

Exploration
Villages, temples, strongholds, ocean monuments

Multiplayer
Servers, PvP, mini-games like BedWars and SkyWars

Advanced Tips
Clutch techniques, mob farms, trading halls

Top Tips:
Build shelter early, always carry torches, avoid lava, organize inventory
csgo:
Counter-Strike: Global Offensive (CS:GO) is a tactical FPS game where Terrorists and Counter-Terrorists compete in strategic team-based matches.

Main Modes

Competitive — 5v5 ranked mode
Wingman — 2v2 matches
Casual — relaxed mode
Deathmatch — aim practice
Arms Race — weapon progression mode

Popular Maps
Dust II, Mirage, Inferno, Nuke, Ancient, Overpass

Controls
WASD movement, mouse for shooting, shift walk, ctrl crouch

Aim Skills
Flick, tracking, crosshair placement, spray control

Movement
Counter-strafe is essential for accuracy

Weapons
AK-47, M4A4/M4A1-S, AWP, Deagle

Economy
Eco rounds, force buys, full buys are key strategies

Utility
Smokes, flashes, molotovs, grenades are very important

Game Mechanics
Bomb planting and defusal define rounds

Advanced Skills
Pre-fire, trade kills, map control, positioning

Common Mistakes
Running while shooting, bad economy, no utility usage

Tips
Always keep crosshair at head level, communicate with team, use cover

Practice daily with aim maps and deathmatch
carparking:
Car Parking Multiplayer is an open-world driving and parking simulator with multiplayer features, car tuning, drifting, and roleplay.

Modes
Free Mode — open world driving
Parking Missions — parking challenges
Multiplayer — online interaction and races
Drag Racing — straight-line speed races
Police Mode — roleplay servers

Controls
Steering, throttle, brake, handbrake, camera views

Cars
Sedans, sports cars, SUVs, drift cars

Tuning
Engine, turbo, suspension, brakes, transmission, tires

Drifting
Requires RWD cars, throttle control, and handbrake use

Parking
Focus on precision and slow control

Physics
Realistic handling, weight transfer, braking

Multiplayer
Car meets, drift events, RP servers

Customization
Paint, wheels, body kits, sound tuning

Tips
Control speed, learn smooth driving, tune properly, avoid crashes

Advanced Tips
Perfect drift control, racing lines, police escape techniques

Optimization
Use high FPS, stable internet, and avoid overheating

Improvement
Practice parking, drifting, and multiplayer events daily

Top Tips:
Smooth driving is better than speed, tuning matters, learn camera control
